page.content: In Table 1, the header "Snippet Length" includes the rows for "4 Amino Acids," "5 Amino Acids," "6 Amino Acids," "7 Amino Acids," "2 DNA Triplets," "6 DNA Triplets," and "6 Amino Acids," with respective values of "Atchley Factors" providing classification accuracy on the training data set by exhaustive 1-holdout cross-validation of 11/23 ≈ 47.8%, 15/23 ≈ 65.2%, 20/23 ≈ 87.0%, 14/23 ≈ 60.9%, 12/23 ≈ 52.2%, 8/23 ≈ 34.8%, and 15/23 ≈ 65.2%.

cells.cell_text: Classification Accuracy on the Training Data Set by Exhaustive 1-Holdout Cross-Validation

page.content: In Table 2, the header columns include the years 1993 (n = 281) and 2013 (n = 215) with the significance level denoted by p *. The row labeled "SBP (mmHg)" has values of 111.6 ± 13.2 in 1993 and 118.7 ± 13.9 in 2013, with p * <0.001. The row labeled "DBP (mmHg)" shows 71.0 ± 8.7 for 1993 and 77.1 ± 9.2 for 2013, also with p * <0.001. The "BMI (kg/m2)" row presents 20.7 ± 2.1 for 1993 and 23.7 ± 3.9 for 2013, with p * at 0.017.
